tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij zdania, wstawiając wyrazy podane w nawiasach w odpowiedniej formie. Wymagana jest pełna poprawność gramatyczna i ortograficzna odpowiedzi.

items.context: By the time we _________ (arrive) at the cinema, the film _________ (already / start), so we missed the beginning.
She _________ (study) Spanish for three years and _________ (just / pass) her first official exam.
I promise I _________ (finish) my homework before dinner and then I _________ (help) you with the dishes.
When my grandfather was young, he _________ (walk) to school every day because his family _________ (not / own) a car.
Look! The children _________ (build) a snowman in the garden. They _________ (be) outside for two hours already.
Scientists announced yesterday that they _________ (discover) a new species of frog that _________ (live) deep in the Amazon rainforest.
